name.title: Share name
name.label: Choose a name for your share
name.info: Must only contain numbers, letters, underscores, dashes or full stops and must not exceed 255 characters.

error.too_small: The ‘share name’ field cannot be empty. Please enter a name.

region.label: 1-AZ Region
region.description: Resilient and low-cost deployment in 1 zone.

localzone.label: Local Zone
localzone.description: Deploy as close as possible for low latency.

availabilityZone.title: Choose your Availability Zone
availabilityZone.informations: A default Availability Zone has been selected. You can customise this choice.

shareSize.title: Share size
shareSize.description: 5% of the storage capacity is allocated to snapshots
shareSize.label: Linear performance allocation ($t(units.gigabyte))

error.min_value: The share size is below the minimum allowed for this option.
error.max_value: The share size is above the maximum allowed for this option.

network.title: Private network
network.description: Select the private network you wish to connect your share to.
network.label: Select an existing private network
network.empty: You don’t have a private network for this region

subnet.label: Select an existing private subnet
subnet.empty: You don’t have a private subnet for this network

submit.error: An error occurred while adding the share: {{error}}
submit.success: Creating {{name}} share. This may take a few minutes.

title: Create a share
description: Create a share that can be accessed within your Public Cloud project. Need more information about Public Cloud File Storage? <0>See our documentation</0>
